nasb.text: And you shall rise from your ambush and take possession of the city, for the Lord your God will deliver it into your hand.

esv.text: Then you shall rise up from the ambush and seize the city, for the Lord your God will give it into your hand.

cnv.text: 那時你們就要從埋伏的地方起來，佔領那城，因為耶和華你們的　神必把城交在你們的手裡。

ccb.text: 那时，你们便从埋伏的地方冲出来攻占艾城，你们的上帝耶和华一定会把艾城交在你们手里。
